description: An en-US agent that opens in Spanish trips greeting_language, covering the English side of the check.

transcript_object.content: Gracias por llamar a Acme Wellness, habla Ava. ¿En qué puedo ayudarle hoy?
Yes, of course. How can I help you today?
I wanted to ask about facials.
Happy to help. Our Signature Facial is a 60-minute treatment with a licensed esthetician.
